revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Navbox with columns |name = World's most populous urban areas |title = World's 50 [[List of largest cities|most-populous urban areas]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |colwidth = 20em
|col1={{olist |[[Greater Tokyo Area|Tokyo]] |[[Jakarta metropolitan area|Jakarta]] |[[National Capital Region (India)|Delhi]] |[[Guangzhou]]–[[Foshan]] |[[Mumbai Metropolitan Region|Mumbai]] |[[Greater Manila Area|Manila]] |[[Shanghai]] |[[Seoul Capital Area|Seoul]] |[[Greater Cairo|Cairo]] |[[Greater Mexico City|Mexico City]] }}
|col2={{olist|start=11 |[[Kolkata metropolitan area|Kolkata]] |[[Greater São Paulo|São Paulo]] |[[New York metropolitan area|New York]] |[[Karachi]] |[[Greater Dhaka|Dhaka]] |[[Bangkok Metropolitan Region|Bangkok]] |[[Beijing]] |[[Moscow metropolitan area|Moscow]] |[[Shenzhen]] |[[Greater Buenos Aires|Buenos Aires]] }}

|col5={{olist|start=41 |[[Lima metropolitan area|Lima]] |[[Wuhan]] |[[Metropolitan Area of Bogotá|Bogotá]] |[[Tianjin]] |[[Hyderabad Metropolitan Region|Hyderabad]] |[[Taipei–Keelung metropolitan area|Taipei]] |[[Hangzhou]] |[[Chūkyō metropolitan area|Nagoya]] |[[Surabaya metropolitan area|Surabaya]] |[[Bandung metropolitan area|Bandung]] }}
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> {{documentation|content= The ranking is based on [[Demographia]]'s "World Urban Areas" study.<ref name="Demographia">{{cite web|title=Demographia World Urban Areas, 19th Annual Edition|url=http://www.demographia.com/db-worldua.pdf|publisher=[[Demographia]]|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20200207210003/www.demographia.com/db-worldua.pdf|archive-date=7 February 2020|date=1 November 2023}}</ref>

|col1={{olist |[[:en:Greater Tokyo Area|Tokyo]] |[[Jakarta metropolitan area|Jakarta]] |[[National Capital Region (India)|Delhi]] |[[:en:Guangzhou|Guangzhou]]–[[:en:Foshan|Foshan]] |[[Mumbai Metropolitan Region|Mumbai]] |[[:en:Greater Manila Area|Manila]] |[[Shanghai]] |[[Seoul Capital Area|Seoul]] |[[:en:Greater Cairo|Cairo]] |[[:en:Greater Mexico City|Mexico City]] }}
|col2={{olist|start=11 |[[Kolkata metropolitan area|Kolkata]] |[[:en:Greater São Paulo|São Paulo]] |[[New York metropolitan area|New York]] |[[Karachi]] |[[:en:Greater Dhaka|Dhaka]] |[[:en:Bangkok Metropolitan Region|Bangkok]] |[[:en:Beijing|Beijing]] |[[Moscow metropolitan area|Moscow]] |[[Shenzhen]] |[[:en:Greater Buenos Aires|Buenos Aires]] }}
|col3={{olist|start=21 |[[:en:Greater Los Angeles|Los Angeles]] |[[Johannesburg]]-[[Pretoria]] |[[:en:Bengaluru|Bengaluru]] |[[:en:Chengdu|Chengdu]] |[[Ho Chi Minh City metropolitan area|Ho Chi Minh City]] |[[Keihanshin|Osaka–Kobe–Kyoto]] |[[Lagos]] |[[Istanbul]] |[[Lahore]] |[[Kinshasa]]–[[:en:Brazzaville|Brazzaville]] }}
|col4={{olist|start=31 |[[:en:Greater Tehran|Tehran]] |[[:en:Chongqing|Chongqing]] |[[:en:Greater Rio de Janeiro|Rio de Janeiro]] |[[Xi'an]] |[[:en:Chennai metropolitan area|Chennai]] |[[Paris metropolitan area|Paris]] |[[Zhengzhou]] |[[Luanda]] |[[:en:Greater London Built-up Area|London]] |[[:en:Dongguan|Dongguan]] }}
|col5={{olist|start=41 |[[Lima metropolitan area|Lima]] |[[Wuhan]] |[[Metropolitan Area of Bogotá|Bogotá]] |[[Tianjin]] |[[Hyderabad Metropolitan Region|Hyderabad]] |[[Taipei–Keelung metropolitan area|Taipei]] |[[Hangzhou]] |[[:en:Chūkyō metropolitan area|Nagoya]] |[[Surabaya metropolitan area|Surabaya]] |[[:en:Bandung metropolitan area|Bandung]] }}
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> {{documentation|content= The Ranking is based on [[:en:Demographia|Demographia]]'s "World Urban Areas" study.<ref name="Demographia">{{cite web|title=Demographia World Urban Areas, 19th Annual Edition|url=http://www.demographia.com/db-worldua.pdf|publisher=[[:en:Demographia|Demographia]]|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20200207210003/www.demographia.com/db-worldua.pdf|archive-date=7 February 2020|date=1 November 2023}}</ref>
{{world's most populous urban areas|state=uncollapsed}}
=== References === {{reflist}} }}
{{Navbox documentation}}
</noinclude>
